description:
Legal document. Seven fragments joined together (by Moshe Yagur and Alan Elbaum) to form a court record. On recto (should be verso) a court record, written by Halfon b. Menashshe Halevi (fl. 1100-1138 CE), in which Issac b. Shemuʾel the Spaniard and Avraham b. Shema’ya are parties in a debt settlement. Also testimony on the arrival of Barukh b. Yitsḥak from Aleppo to Egypt. On verso (should be recto) a letter sent to Yitsḥak b. Shemuʾel. 
Judeo-Arabic, Aramaic. AA
description_he: מסמך משפטי בAramaic, Judaeo-Arabic מהמאה ה-12. מוחזק בבית המדרש לרבנים.
